description: Bifolio of mercantile accounts. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: likely 11th century, maybe 12th. Fol. 1r may be headed by a biblical verse. Mentions the date Tuesday, 3 Rabīʿ I "which is Tammuz." Mentions the name Abū l-Khayr several time, as well as Yosef. Most entries are crossed out with a glyph-like notation.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
